description: production/CONTEXT.md and production/workflows/CONTEXT.md do not document that their output is consumed by community/. The handoff is documented in community/CONTEXT.md (receiver) but not in production (sender).
evidence: Structural audit found community/CONTEXT.md references production/workflows/04-output/ as input. No corresponding note exists in production files.
proposed_expansion: Add to production/CONTEXT.md Hard Rules section: 'Rule 5: Output in 04-output/ is consumed by community/. Name output files with sufficient description that community agents can identify relevance without reading the spec.'
